caption: A sequence of clips alternates between a repeated graphic and live-action footage. The graphic consists of a light background with the website "www.plustvafrica.com" at the top and the words "SUBSCRIBE" and "SUBSCRIBED" layered in red and white text, accompanied by a small notification bell icon. The live-action segments show different scenes. One scene depicts an individual in a grey shirt being physically restrained and pushed toward the ground by another person in a dark uniform. Another clip shows a person wearing a black shirt with "SARS LAGOS" printed on the back and a red scorpion logo with the text "CORON" beneath it. A final scene shows a person in a tan uniform standing beside a large yellow and green vehicle on a street with a modern building in the background. The footage transitions rapidly between these disjointed events and the recurring subscribe graphic.
